_source_text:
BRONX COMMUNITY BOARD 9
Land Use Committee Meeting
Monday, March 18, 2024, 6:30 PM
1932 Arthur Avenue, Bronx, NY 10457

AGENDA

Item 4. BSA Calendar No. 2024-0312-BZ — Variance Application, 455 East 183rd Street

The applicant, Fordham Towers LLC, seeks a variance from the Board of Standards and Appeals for the property at 455 East 183rd Street, Bronx, NY 10458. The application requests relief from the maximum building height limitations of the R6 district to permit a six-story mixed-use building. No ULURP application is associated with this BSA matter.

Community Board 9 will hear public testimony on March 18, 2024, at 6:30 PM. The BSA public hearing is scheduled for April 16, 2024.
title: BSA Variance Application — 455 East 183rd Street
summary: Community Board 9 (Bronx) to hear testimony on a Board of Standards and Appeals variance application at 455 East 183rd Street seeking height relief in an R6 district for a six-story mixed-use building.
